name: NexGen Energy Ltd.
content: NexGen Energy Ltd. is a Canadian-based corporation focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of uranium projects in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan, Canada. The company's primary asset is the Rook I Project, which hosts the high-grade Arrow Deposit, one of the largest undeveloped uranium resources in the world. NexGen is committed to developing the project with a focus on environmental sustainability and social responsibility, aiming to become a leading supplier of clean energy fuel to the global nuclear power industry.
